title: VAL-26634 [UI/UX][CI] Build & Test Run Page Header & Run Stepper
body:
FeatureOwner

MxJIRAissuekey,summary,issuetype,created,updated,duedate,assignee,reporter,priority,status,resolutionkey,summary,type,created,updated,due,assignee,reporter,priority,status,resolution67e031c3-c684-3aab-b7af-9bf49d41e788VAL-26634

 


Functional Questions:

QuestionAnswer

The Stepper for stages have "Start Date" and "End Date" do we need that? To ote it doesn't xist in the upgrade process

  

yes we need it. it eixsts in current behaviour but current upgrade process doens't have it by mistake it is needed tho

When to show the expiration tag for 

same as upgrade, always shown unles th eprocess is finished

In the branch details tab, are we showing the commits using the same logic as the Upgrade Process? 

same





Technical Notes:

The Stepper for stages have "Start Date" and "End Date" are needed similar to existing

  • Abort button already done: use the execution-abort-button component
  • Keep in mind that Roma will add Reference Environment to MV next PI as well, to sync with them
  • For the BP status, use the execution-status-tag component already present
  • For the BP expiration tag, use the mxevolve-expiry-chip already present

Branch Details same as the upgrade

No Reference Environment like in the upgrade process


  • Process Run page header:
    • Run Name
    • Process Status
    • Expiry tag

Activity Run Details Content:

      • The fields that are needed are the following:
        • General:
          • Template Name: the BP definition name
          • Activity Type: Process Type ex: Build & Test Process/Configuration Build & Test
          • Description: BP definition description (optional)
        • Config Parameters:
        • Build Scenario Definition (Check if there is name if not id ot sure what code now has)
        • Infrastructure Parameters
          • Build Environment Infra Group
          • Test Environment Infra Group
    • Branch Details
      • Fields: same as the upgrade
    • Abort
  • Stepper migration
    • Reuse common one we have for upgrade process 
  • When first a CI Process is created replaced the info message i have now thats says "The business process execution is currently loading..." with create branch illustration that i have in the validation process
